name: Gargoyle

traits.name: Flyby
traits.text: The gargoyle doesn’t provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

text:
# Gargoyle

*Medium Elemental, Chaotic Evil*

A stone-skinned elemental predator that perches motionless among true statues.

### Actions

**Claw.** Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) Slashing damage.
